## Role
What role should this agent pack fill? (e.g., "DevOps Engineer", "Content Writer")

## Use Case
Describe what you'd use this agent for in 2-3 sentences.

List 3-5 skills this agent should have:

-
-

## Platform
Where will you deploy this agent?
- [ ] ClawPod (managed hosting)
- [ ] Self-hosted OpenClaw
